narrative_beat: Figura humana contra vitral com sete selos

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a contemporary human silhouette standing before a massive gothic cathedral stained-glass window depicting seven wax seals, two cracked and glowing crimson, five intact
subject.focal_point: the two broken seals at top of the window pulsing with crimson light
subject.secondary: The figure is faceless, back to camera, illuminated warmly by the stained-glass reflection
props: seven wax seals in stained glass

composition.foreground: stained glass in rich crimson, gold, cobalt

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, stained-glass color bleed
style.texture_detail: heavy 35mm grain, dust motes in beams

symbolism.primary: man standing before the apocalyptic schedule

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
